C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. DEPT. 503A. VINCENT SCOTTO, PRO TEM JUDGE. M. ECHEVERRIA, CLRK. TEANNA WARD, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: PLTF. ATTY ARNOLD W. EVJE II AND PROPERTY SUPERVISOR LESLIE MOLINA. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIS, RALPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVE. #228, S.F. CA., LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. WILL STAY UNTILL 8/21/01, IF DEFT DON'T VACATE BY THE DATE, DEFT. WILL PAY UNPAID RENT OF $2250 & DAILY DAMAGES $15 PER DAY FROM 7/1 TO 8/21/01 PLUS COSTS OF $188 FOR TOTAL JUDGMENT AMT OF $3218.00, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
